zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pettipoole於1690年2月15日出生在美國維吉尼亞州普林斯 喬治時，他的父親William Pettypool Jr.31歲，母親Elizabeth Tucker18歲。他於大約1716年與Frances Talley在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是14個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1774年9月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州哈利法可哈利法可享年84歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州哈利法可哈利法可哈利法可 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Pettipoole于1690年2月15日出生在美国弗吉尼亚州普林斯 喬治时，他的父亲William Pettypool Jr.31岁，母亲Elizabeth Tucker18岁。他于大约1716年与Frances Talley在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是14个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1774年9月14日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州哈利法可哈利法可享年84岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州哈利法可哈利法可哈利法可 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pettipoole was born on 15 February 1690, in Prince George, Virginia, United States, his father, William Pettypool Jr., was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Tucker, was 18. He married Frances Talley about 1716, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 14 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 September 1774, in Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 84, and was buried in Halifax Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pettipoole est né le 15 février 1690, à Prince George, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, William Pettypool Jr., avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tucker, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Frances Talley environ 1716, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 14 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1774, à Halifax, Halifax, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Halifax Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Pettipoole am 15. Februar 1690 in Prince George, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Pettypool Jr. 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tucker 18. Er hat um 1716 in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten Frances Talley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 14 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. September 1774 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Halifax Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Pettipoole è nato il il 15 febbraio 1690 nel Prince George, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, William Pettypool Jr., aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tucker, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Frances Talley circa 1716, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 14 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 settembre 1774, nel Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Halifax Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Pettipooleが1690年2月15日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州プリンス ジョーッジで生まれた時，父William Pettypool Jr.は31歳，母Elizabeth Tuckerは18歳であった。約1716年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でFrances Talleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも14人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1774年9月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ハリファックスハリファックスで84歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州ハリファックスハリファックスハリファックス セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pettipoole(이)가 1690년 2월 15일 미국 버지니아 주 프린스 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Pettypool Jr.(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tucker(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1716년 미국 버지니아 주에서 Frances Talley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1774년 9월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 할이파스 할이파스에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 할이파스 할이파스 할이파스 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Pettipoole nasceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1690, em Prince George, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, William Pettypool Jr., tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tucker, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Frances Talley aproximadamente 1716, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 14 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1774, em Halifax, Halifax, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Halifax Cemetery, Halifax, Halifax, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pettipoole родился 15 февраля 1690 г. в местности принц джеордж, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени William Pettypool Jr. было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tucker, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Talley около 1716 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 сентября 1774 г. в местности хэлифакс, хэлифакс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлифакс кеметири, хэлифакс, хэлифакс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.
